expectations.text: Output contains three distinct review layers or sections
expectations.evidence: Layer 1, Layer 2, Layer 3 all present with headings

expectations.text: Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
expectations.evidence: Multiple BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, NICE-TO-HAVE labels throughout all layers

expectations.text: Output mentions missing semantic landmark elements (main, nav, header, or footer)
expectations.evidence: Layer 1 SHOULD-FIX: 'HTML is minimal but has no semantic structure (main, nav, footer landmarks missing)'

expectations.text: Output flags the title 'Astro' as needing to be changed
expectations.evidence: Layer 1 BLOCKER: 'Page title is generic Astro (default boilerplate)'

expectations.text: Output notes that no API routes exist yet (Layer 3 is limited in scope for now)
expectations.evidence: Layer 3 raises 2 BLOCKERs about Edge functions and .env.example without clearly noting these are future-planning items, not current violations
Summary section present with per-layer counts: Layer 1: 5, Layer 2: 4, Layer 3: 4
